'''N'tain Xalis''' was an [[Agent/Legends|agent]] who served the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Xalis was the leader of [[Sandwind group|Sandwind Team]] cell, with eleven operatives coordinating Rebel activities in [[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector]] from a farm on [[Motesta]], [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. They also used contacts and unofficial foster agents.<ref name="AIR" />

Although Xalis wanted to work with relative stillness, Tatooine was a difficult place for it: The search for the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] plans and later the hunt of [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]] perturbed Xalis's activities. Afterward, a rogue [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] known as the [[Jundland Banshee]] vandalized Xalis's equipment (such as communication sub-anchors 3 and 12). Besides, the Banshee's activities could lead to an increase in security presence, such as more stormtroopers, which could mean the end of Sandwind team.<ref name="AIR" />

For a time, Xalis had to go to [[Elus sector/Legends|Elus sector]]. During this period, Xalis was replaced by Rebel officer [[Adazian Liebke]], who also had problems with the Jundland Banshee. Xalis also helped [[Tay Vanis]] to hide when he was being chased by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Murquan]].<ref name="AIR" />

Xalis eventually wrote a report for the [[Task Force on Alliance Security]] about the threat posed by the Jundland Banshee. Liebke and Vanis supported Xalis during it.<ref name="AIR" />
